central_thesis: Most prediction-market edge claims collapse under leakage review, portability testing, and execution-realism analysis. The useful residual is not alpha but methodology: provenance infrastructure, cost-aware selection logic, and the demonstrated willingness to kill results that cannot survive review.

sections.title: False Edge: What Failed Under Review
What This Page Does Not Claim

limitations: No validated out-of-sample performance on any venue.
Selection system had critical bugs and was never deployed.
Page does not constitute investment advice or claims of alpha.
